summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OpenRTB Bidder advanced features including Win/Billing notifications, Budget pacing, Campaign performance reporting, and Bid shading integration

minor_issues.issue: Returns 204 No-bid response for test requests
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior when no campaigns match targeting criteria

passed_tests: Win notification endpoint POST /api/notify/win/{bid_id} (returns appropriate 404 for non-existent bids)
Billing notification endpoint POST /api/notify/billing/{bid_id} (returns appropriate 404 for non-existent bids)
Reports summary endpoint GET /api/reports/summary returns comprehensive analytics data
Campaign report endpoint GET /api/reports/campaign/{id} returns detailed performance metrics
Pacing status endpoint GET /api/pacing/status returns campaign pacing information
Reset daily spend endpoint POST /api/pacing/reset-all successfully resets campaign budgets
Reports page loads successfully with charts and performance metrics
Pacing page displays campaign budget status with interactive controls
Campaign form includes comprehensive Bid Shading configuration tab
Bid response integration includes nurl and burl callback URLs
Dashboard displays real-time bidding activity and spend analytics
Navigation between all advanced feature pages works correctly
